message:
feat(raptorq): add E2E pipeline conformance tests with loss scenarios

Conformance test suite (raptorq_conformance.rs, bd-15c5):
- LossPattern enum: None, Random{seed, drop_per_mille},
  Burst{drop_per_mille, position}, Insufficient
- BurstPosition: Early or Late in symbol stream
- Scenario struct linking loss pattern to expected outcome

Detailed reporting structures:
- ConfigReport: symbol_size, block config, seed, data_len
- LossReport: kind, drop/keep counts, burst details
- SymbolReport: generated vs received symbol counts
- OutcomeReport: success/failure with reject reason

Test coverage:
- No loss (baseline decode)
- Random loss at various rates (5‰, 10‰, 50‰)
- Burst loss (early and late positions)
- Insufficient symbols (expected failure)
- Verifies proof artifacts match execution

Decoder/proof updates:
- decoder.rs: Minor adjustments for test integration
- proof.rs: Supporting changes for conformance verification

Test utilities (tests/common/mod.rs):
- Helper functions for conformance test infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
